title: USACE CWMS Time Series Structure
description: Documentation of the data structure for time series responses from the USACE CWMS Data API

fields.name: office-id
fields.description: USACE district office abbreviation (e.g., SWT=Tulsa District, LRH=Huntington District)

fields.name: units
fields.description: Engineering unit for the parameter values (e.g., ft for stage, cfs for flow)

fields.name: interval
fields.description: Regular interval between observations in minutes (0 for irregular)

fields.name: interval-offset
fields.description: Offset from midnight in minutes for interval alignment

fields.name: time-zone
fields.description: IANA timezone name for interpreting timestamp values

fields.name: values
fields.description: Array of observations, each as a 3-element array: [epoch_ms, measurement, quality_code]

index_1.name: value
index_1.description: Measured value in the specified units (-9999999.0 indicates missing)

fields.name: page
fields.description: Opaque pagination cursor for the current page

fields.name: next-page
fields.description: Cursor for retrieving the next page; null when on the last page

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total number of observations matching the query
